rationale.R1.2: The critique and rewrite walk the argument chain end-to-end, identifying multiple issues and proposing clear fixes.
rationale.RX.1: Confidence levels are explicitly marked for each recommendation, and uncertainty is disclosed where appropriate.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional claims.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content were introduced; minor regressions in specificity are balanced by improved clarity and precision.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source (the original paragraph) and reason (critique points).
